*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Diabetic to Right plantar / Measures 4.7 cm x 1.4 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, none. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right plantar wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Right plantar measures 4.7 cm x 1.4 cm x 0.4 cm.
  Wound bed: 23% slough, 77% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: none. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Right plantar — not improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Alginate dressing applied.
